title: The Shore Boutique Hotel
testimonial: Our guests consistently comment on the lobby and lounge as their favourite part of the property. Groove Infra created something truly memorable — a space that feels like it belongs in a design magazine.
description: Complete interior fit-out for a 24-room boutique hotel including lobby, reception, all-day dining café, rooftop bar, and 8 premium suites. The design language draws from Goa's Portuguese heritage, blended with contemporary minimalism — terracotta, rattan, white plaster, and lush greenery.
